name: Work milestone stories
description: Resolves every story id assigned to a milestone, runs a Cursor CLI agent on each story in a loop, marks each Done, then runs quality once and optionally fixes failures via cursor-agent.

next_tasks.name: Work story (Cursor CLI, composer-2.5, auto mode)

input.prompt:
You are implementing S.E.E. story {{runtime.story_id}} to completion. Operate fully autonomously in auto mode: do not pause for approval, do not ask the user, do not stop until the story is fully implemented or you hit a hard failure you cannot resolve. Do NOT invoke the /work skill; do the work directly.

Procedure:
1. Find the story file by globbing `.s_e_e/stories/stories/{{runtime.story_id}} - *.md`. If zero or multiple match, abort and report.
2. Read the story: Description, every `- [ ] #N` acceptance criterion, Implementation Plan, and frontmatter `status` / `dependencies` / `labels`.
3. Read every file the Implementation Plan references before editing.
4. Implement in tight loops: one focused change per iteration, add or update tests for that change, run `mise run build` and fix failures, run the relevant targeted tests and fix failures. Flip each `- [ ] #N` to `- [x] #N` only after that acceptance criterion is verified.
5. Run `mise run quality` and fix until green. Never declare done while build, tests, or quality are red.
6. Fill `## Implementation Notes` and `## Final Summary` between their existing HTML section markers. Do not touch the markers themselves.

Hard rules: never proceed past a failing build or test; every code change needs a test; do not flip acceptance criteria you did not verify; do not edit other stories or knowledge files unless an acceptance criterion requires it; keep code and text terse.
